---
title: "TODO — epic title"
epic-id: TODO-gantt-id-and-slug   # == directory name, e.g. A10-thermal-mapping
initiative: TODO-initiative-slug
gantt-id: TODO                    # e.g. A10 — must be unique across all epics
gantt-dates: [TODO-start, TODO-end]   # ISO dates; mirror the Gantt bar
status: open                      # open | in-progress | blocked | done
owner: TODO-owner
customer: TODO — who this epic serves
need: TODO — the problem being solved
benefit: TODO — the payoff when it closes
thesis-chapters: []               # e.g. [chapters/02-optimize/CH-2b-improvements.qmd]
related-epics: []                 # e.g. [A3-toolpath-planning-workflow]
---

## Background

> TODO — why this epic exists; reference parent/sibling epics and the
> route being taken.

## Status log

<!-- Dated bullets, newest first, each linking its weekly update:
- **W<N> (YYYY-MM-DD):** what moved this week.
  → [WU-YYYY-MM-DD week N](../../../../updates/WU-YYYY-MM-DD-week-NN/index.html)
     Done epics add a `## Resolution` section above the listing. -->

{{< include _listing.md >}}

{{< include _revisions.md >}}
